'''jahada''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:mycoderma|mycoderma]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| j-h-d
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:mycoderma|mycoderma]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| jahada
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:jæhædæth|jæhædæth]] || [[word:jæhædæj|jæhædæj]] || [[word:jæhædæsh|jæhædæsh]] || [[word:jæhædæ|jæhædæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:jahahadath|jahahadath]] || [[word:jahahadaj|jahahadaj]] || [[word:jahahadash|jahahadash]] || [[word:jahahada|jahahada]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:jahadath|jahadath]] || [[word:jahadaj|jahadaj]] || [[word:jahadash|jahadash]] || [[word:jahada|jahada]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:jahafdath|jahafdath]] || [[word:jahafdaj|jahafdaj]] || [[word:jahafdash|jahafdash]] || [[word:jahafdaf|jahafdaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:jahadatha|jahadatha]] || [[word:jahadaja|jahadaja]] || [[word:jahadasha|jahadasha]] || [[word:jahadaka|jahadaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:jahadath|jahadath]] || [[word:jahadaj|jahadaj]] || [[word:jahadash|jahadash]] || [[word:jahada|jahada]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:jahadathal|jahadathal]] || [[word:jahadajal|jahadajal]] || [[word:jahadashal|jahadashal]] || [[word:jahadakal|jahadakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:jahadathatha|jahadathatha]] || [[word:jahadajaja|jahadajaja]] || [[word:jahadashasha|jahadashasha]] || [[word:jahadaka|jahadaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:jahadathan|jahadathan]] || [[word:jahadajan|jahadajan]] || [[word:jahadashan|jahadashan]] || [[word:jahadakan|jahadakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:jahadathaoro|jahadathaoro]] || [[word:jahadajaoro|jahadajaoro]] || [[word:jahadashaoro|jahadashaoro]] || [[word:jahadakaoro|jahadakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|dea8a94}}
